system.damage: three-inch long teeth d10+3 (_close_, _reach_, _grabby_, _messy_, 3 piercing, advantage)
system.moves:
- Roar and unfurl its quills, making even brave warriors quail
- Bite a limb clean off
- To lose itself in primal fury

The mighty "rage drake," almost 10 feet tall and 20 feet from nose to tip of tail. Its jaws are full of knives. Blood-red patterns surround its eyes. A frill of feathered quills sprouts from its neck and runs down its back. Maybe a half-dozen of them stalk the whole Great Wood, and one hasn’t been spotted near Stonetop for generations (Tor be praised). Something interesting: They prey mostly on large game (wisents, tal gerdwyr, etc.). They’ll attack people, but rarely hunt them. Something useful: They attack people to establish dominance, seeing us as rivals. An appropriate offering or show of obeisance might calm one enough for you to get the hell out of there.
